jd_text: Key Responsibilities: Lead end-to-end homecare operations (clinical & non-clinical) Ensure high-quality patient care aligned with clinical standards Optimize workforce planning (nursing, physicians, logistics) Monitor KPIs (utilization, visits per day, cost per visit, patient satisfaction) Drive efficiency in scheduling, dispatching, and routing Ensure compliance with regulatory and accreditation requirements Collaborate with digital, primary care, and support functions Lead expansion and scaling of homecare services Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Healthcare Administration, Medicine, or a related field Relevant experience in homecare operations or healthcare management Strong leadership and team management skills Experience with healthcare regulations and accreditation standards Data-driven mindset with experience in KPI monitoring and performance improvement
